code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of triples about a politician into a readable sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Group triples by subject to organize information
    subject_data = {}
    for t in triples:
        if t.subject not in subject_data:
            subject_data[t.subject] = []
        subject_data[t.subject].append(t)

    # Get the main subject (first one or most common)
    main_subject = list(subject_data.keys())[0]
    main_triples = subject_data[main_subject]

    # Build sentence parts by category
    birth_info = []
    death_info = []
    career_info = []
    personal_info = []
    country_info = []

    predicate_templates = {
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"was born in {o}",
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"was born on {o}",
        "birthYear": lambda s, o: f"was born in {o}",
        "deathPlace": lambda s, o: f"died in {o}",
        "deathDate": lambda s, o: f"died on {o}",
        "deathYear": lambda s, o: f"died in {o}",
        "nationality": lambda s, o: f"is a {o} national",
        "party": lambda s, o: f"belongs to the {o} party",
        "office": lambda s, o: f"held the office of {o}",
        "successor": lambda s, o: f"was succeeded by {o}",
        "predecessor": lambda s, o: f"was preceded by {o}",
        "spouse": lambda s, o: f"was married to {o}",
        "residence": lambda s, o: f"resides at {o}",
        "region": lambda s, o: f"is from the region of {o}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"comes from {o}",
        "battle": lambda s, o: f"participated in the {o}",
        "almaMater": lambda s, o: f"graduated from {o}",
        "profession": lambda s, o: f"worked as a {o}",
        "award": lambda s, o: f"received the {o} award",
        "militaryBranch": lambda s, o: f"served in the {o}",
        "militaryRank": lambda s, o: f"held the rank of {o}",
        "inOfficeWhilePresident": lambda s, o: f"served while {o} was president",
        "inOfficeWhilePrimeMinister": lambda s, o: f"served while {o} was prime minister",
        "hasDeputy": lambda s, o: f"had {o} as deputy",
        "activeYearsStartDate": lambda s, o: f"started active service in {o}",
        "activeYearsEndDate": lambda s, o: f"ended active service in {o}",
        "serviceStartYear": lambda s, o: f"started service in {o}",
        "numberOfVotesAttained": lambda s, o: f"attained {o} votes",
        "religion": lambda s, o: f"follows the {o} religion",
        "state": lambda s, o: f"is from the state of {o}",
        "inOfficeWhileVicePresident": lambda s, o: f"served while {o} was vice president",
        "inOfficeWhileGovernor": lambda s, o: f"served while {o} was governor",
        "inOfficeWhileMonarch": lambda s, o: f"served while {o} was monarch",
        "default": lambda s, o: f"{s} {o}"
    }

    # Categorize triples
    for t in main_triples:
        template_func = predicate_templates.get(t.predicate, predicate_templates["default"])
        clause = template_func(main_subject, t.object)

        if t.predicate in ["birthPlace", "birthDate", "birthYear"]:
            birth_info.append(clause)
        elif t.predicate in ["deathPlace", "deathDate", "deathYear"]:
            death_info.append(clause)
        elif t.predicate in ["office", "party", "successor", "predecessor", "hasDeputy",
                            "inOfficeWhilePresident", "inOfficeWhilePrimeMinister",
                            "inOfficeWhileVicePresident", "inOfficeWhileGovernor",
                            "inOfficeWhileMonarch", "activeYearsStartDate",
                            "activeYearsEndDate", "serviceStartYear", "numberOfVotesAttained",
                            "militaryBranch", "militaryRank", "battle", "award", "profession"]:
            career_info.append(clause)
        elif t.predicate in ["spouse", "residence", "region", "religion", "almaMater"]:
            personal_info.append(clause)
        elif t.predicate in ["nationality", "country", "state"]:
            country_info.append(clause)

    # Build the sentence
    parts = []

    # Start with birth information
    if birth_info:
        birth_str = ", ".join(birth_info)
        parts.append(f"{main_subject} {birth_str}")
    else:
        parts.append(main_subject)

    # Add country information
    if country_info:
        country_str = ", ".join(country_info)
        if parts:
            parts[-1] = parts[-1] + f", {country_str}"
        else:
            parts.append(f"{main_subject}, {country_str}")

    # Add career information
    if career_info:
        career_str = ", ".join(career_info)
        if len(parts) > 0:
            parts[-1] = parts[-1] + f", {career_str}"
        else:
            parts.append(f"{main_subject}, {career_str}")

    # Add personal information
    if personal_info:
        personal_str = ", ".join(personal_info)
        if len(parts) > 0:
            parts[-1] = parts[-1] + f", {personal_str}"
        else:
            parts.append(f"{main_subject}, {personal_str}")

    # Add death information
    if death_info:
        death_str = ", ".join(death_info)
        if len(parts) > 0:
            parts[-1] = parts[-1] + f", {death_str}"
        else:
            parts.append(f"{main_subject}, {death_str}")

    # Join all parts
    result = ". ".join(parts)
    if not result.endswith("."):
        result += "."

    return result

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
